title: Human CD8 T Cell Transduction and Rapid Expansion Protocol
author: Kristin Anderson
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.sxvefn6

steps.title: Prepare packaging cell line
steps.instruction: Prepare packaging cell line: 1. Resuspend 3x10 6 293T cells with 10 mL LCL media and plate in a 10cm plate. 2. Incubate at 37C overnight.

steps.title: Thaw tubes of DNA
steps.instruction: Thaw tubes of DNA. And prepare 5mL polypropylene tubes (1/plate).

steps.title: Add 280
steps.instruction: Add 280.7 uL EC Buffer.

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.5ug of M-Mix (2.6ul) and 1.5ug of DNA to EC Buffer.

steps.title: Add 32uL of Enhancer and vortex for 1 second
steps.instruction: Add 32uL of Enhancer and vortex for 1 second.

steps.title: Incubate 5 min at Room Temp
steps.instruction: Incubate 5 min at Room Temp.

steps.title: Add 60uL of Effectene
steps.instruction: Add 60uL of Effectene. Vortex for 10 seconds.

steps.title: Incubate 10 min at Room Temp
steps.instruction: Incubate 10 min at Room Temp.

steps.title: Aspirate media from 293T plates
steps.instruction: Aspirate media from 293T plates. Add 7mL of CTL media to each plate.

steps.title: Add 3 mL of CTL media...
steps.instruction: Add 3 mL of CTL media to each tube of Effectene mixture. Pipette up and down to mix, then add slowly (dropwise) to each 293T plate.

steps.title: Swirl gently to mix and return to 37C incubator overnight
steps.instruction: Swirl gently to mix and return to 37C incubator overnight.

steps.title: Aspirate media from the dish and...
steps.instruction: Aspirate media from the dish and replace with 10mL fresh CTL media. Incubate at 37C.

steps.title: Collect the viral supernatant and filter thru a 0
steps.instruction: Collect the viral supernatant and filter thru a 0.45um filter (Thermo scientific Nalgene syringe filter cat #190-9945).

steps.title: Add 10mL fresh CTL media to...
steps.instruction: Add 10mL fresh CTL media to plates and return to 37C. Alternatively, use frozen viral supernatant.

steps.title: Thaw CD8+ T cells and count
steps.instruction: Thaw CD8+ T cells and count. (Quick thaw at 37C and drop-wise (slow) dilution).

steps.title: Resuspend 2x10 7 T cells with...
steps.instruction: Resuspend 2x10 7 T cells with 2x10 7 anti-CD3 and anti-CD28 beads (1:1 T cell to bead ratio) (Dynabeads Cat#111.41D from Invitrogen). Starting bead concentration = 1x10 8 beads/ml.

steps.title: Wash Dynabeads with 10mL CTL media
steps.instruction: Wash Dynabeads with 10mL CTL media.

steps.title: Dilute the cells to a concentration...
steps.instruction: Dilute the cells to a concentration of 5x10 6 cells/mL, add IL-2 at 50U/mL and transfer into T25 flasks.

steps.title: Incubate at 37C for ~4 hours
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37C for ~4 hours

steps.title: Spin down T cells at 369...
steps.instruction: Spin down T cells at 369 xg for 4-5 minutes at 4C and re-suspend in 10mL CTL media. Recount T cells post-stimulation.

steps.title: Aliquot T cells into 15mL tubes...
steps.instruction: Aliquot T cells into 15mL tubes (1 per transduction condition) and spin down at 369 xg for 4-5 minutes at 4C.

steps.title: Spin down cells at 369 xg...
steps.instruction: Spin down cells at 369 xg for 4-5 minutes at 4C.

steps.title: Resuspend cells in viral supernatant and...
steps.instruction: Resuspend cells in viral supernatant and add 50 U/mL IL-2 and 5ug/mL Polybrene. Transfer 2mL per well to a 12-well plate.

steps.title: Spin cells at 1265 xg at 30C for 90 minutes
steps.instruction: Spin cells at 1265 xg at 30C for 90 minutes.

steps.title: Transfer plates to 37C, 5% CO2 incubator overnight
steps.instruction: Transfer plates to 37C, 5% CO2 incubator overnight.

steps.title: Collect and combine T cells
steps.instruction: Collect and combine T cells. Spin down cells at 369 xg for 4-5 minutes at 4C.

steps.title: Resuspend cells in viral supernatant and...
steps.instruction: Resuspend cells in viral supernatant and add 50 U/mL IL-2 and 5ug/mL Polybrene. Transfer 2mL per well to a 12-well plate.

steps.title: Spin cells at 1265 xg at 30C for 90 minutes
steps.instruction: Spin cells at 1265 xg at 30C for 90 minutes.

steps.title: Transfer plates to 37C, 5% CO2 incubator overnight
steps.instruction: Transfer plates to 37C, 5% CO2 incubator overnight.

steps.title: Add 2 mL per well fresh...
steps.instruction: Add 2 mL per well fresh CTL media containing 100U/mL IL-2.

steps.title: Combine T cells into a 15mL...
steps.instruction: Combine T cells into a 15mL tube and spin down at 369 xg for 4-5 minutes at 4C.

steps.title: Rinse the wells with 5mL CTL...
steps.instruction: Rinse the wells with 5mL CTL media and re-suspend the cells with this. Mix well to break up any clumps.

steps.title: Use the Dyanlmagnet to remove Dynabeads
steps.instruction: Use the Dyanlmagnet to remove Dynabeads. Let tube sit for ~2 minutes so the beads aggregate along the side of the tube.

steps.title: Gently remove the media containing the...
steps.instruction: Gently remove the media containing the cells, careful not to disrupt the beads. Wash the beads one more time with 5mL CTL media.

steps.title: Collect T cells
steps.instruction: Collect T cells. Spin down cells at 369 xg for 4-5 minutes at 4C.

steps.title: Resuspend cells in 8 mL fresh...
steps.instruction: Resuspend cells in 8 mL fresh CTL media containing 1:1000 dilution of IL-

steps.title: Transfer to one well of a 6-well plate
steps.instruction: Transfer to one well of a 6-well plate.

steps.title: Without disturbing cells on the bottom...
steps.instruction: Without disturbing cells on the bottom of the well, remove ½ of the CTL media. Add fresh CTL media containing 100 U/mL IL-2.

steps.title: Without disturbing cells on the bottom...
steps.instruction: Without disturbing cells on the bottom of the well, remove ½ of the CTL media. Add fresh CTL media containing 100 U/mL IL-2.

steps.title: Without disturbing cells on the bottom...
steps.instruction: Without disturbing cells on the bottom of the well, remove ½ of the CTL media. Add fresh CTL media containing 100 U/mL IL-2.

steps.title: Thaw mixed donor PBMC, count and irradiate at 4000 rad
steps.instruction: Thaw mixed donor PBMC, count and irradiate at 4000 rad.

steps.title: Count and irradiate LCL cells at 8000 rad
steps.instruction: Count and irradiate LCL cells at 8000 rad. REP mix preparation depends on the number of CD8 T cells prepared. %s %s

steps.title: Combine all elements of REP mix...
steps.instruction: Combine all elements of REP mix and return to 37C incubator.

steps.title: Add 50 U/ml IL-2
steps.instruction: Add 50 U/ml IL-2
1. Gently pipette off 50-75% of the medium without disturbing the cells 2. Top up with CTL medium & a final concentration of 50 U/ml IL-2 Note: this step repeats every 2 days until day 10-14.
1. Gently pipette off 50-75% of the medium without disturbing the cells 2. Top up with CTL medium & a final concentration of 50 U/ml IL-2
1. Gently pipette off 50-75% of the medium without disturbing the cells 2. Top up with CTL medium & a final concentration of 50 U/ml IL-2
1. Gently pipette off 50-75% of the medium without disturbing the cells 2. Top up with CTL medium & a final concentration of 50 U/ml IL-2
1. Gently pipette off 50-75% of the medium without disturbing the cells 2. Top up with CTL medium & a final concentration of 50 U/ml IL-2
